from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
from pyspark.sql.functions import lit

# ---------------------
# Spark Session
# ---------------------

# ---------------------
# File paths
# ---------------------
file1 = "abfss://general@dloadatdl.dfs.core.windows.net/MS_Crossref_tidy/titleFile (2).csv"
file2 = "abfss://general@dloadatdl.dfs.core.windows.net/MS_Crossref_tidy/titleFile (1).csv"

# ---------------------
# Load both CSVs
# ---------------------
df1 = spark.read.option("header", "true").csv(file1)
df2 = spark.read.option("header", "true").csv(file2)

# Add source markers (to identify later)
df1 = df1.withColumn("source", lit("file1"))
df2 = df2.withColumn("source", lit("file2"))

# ---------------------
# Compare Data
# ---------------------
# Find rows in df1 not in df2
diff1 = df1.subtract(df2)

# Find rows in df2 not in df1
diff2 = df2.subtract(df1)

# Union differences
diff = diff1.union(diff2)

# ---------------------
# Check and Report
# ---------------------
if diff.count() == 0:
    print("NO DIFFERENCE: Both files are identical ✅")
else:
    print("DIFFERENCE FOUND ❌")
    diff.show(truncate=False)  # shows different rows
